prompt:
Subject: room with dappled sunlight

Main Subject:
A horizontal 4:3 indoor portrait. A woman in her 20s sits on the right side of the screen, in a near full-body composition from upper body to toes. The figure occupies about half the overall screen, extending legs toward the front left to create a diagonal line. On the left are bookshelves and a record rack; on the right, a fish tank and a wooden table, creating a space like a small Japanese-style atelier by a window.

Person/Expression:
Fair skin leaning towards bright ivory beige, smooth texture with a hint of pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, collarbone, and knees, leaving natural texture. Precise and elegant doll-like Japanese makeup. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin eyelashes, natural tear bags, soft light brown eyebrows, sheer pink-beige gloss lip. Small clear catchlights in the eyes. Face turned slightly to the upper left, a quiet expression as if looking up at the light from the window.

Clothing/Pose:
Hair is bright milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, layered cut along the face, medium-long to below the shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, with thin highlights and natural stray hairs carefully depicted. Clothing is an off-white ivory ribbed camisole. Thin shoulder straps, modest lace at the chest, a mature silhouette that follows the body naturally. Soft matching shorts below. Bare feet, no loose socks. Right hand resting on a cushion behind the body to support the upper half, left arm placed naturally by the waist. Both knees slightly bent, toes lightly touching the record rack at the front left.

Background/Light:
A warm Japanese vintage room with moderate afternoon sunlight streaming through an old wooden window frame. On the left, a wooden bookshelf, paperbacks, records, old instruments, and a round disco ball. In the back, wooden boxes and plants with illegible blue labels. On the right, a transparent fish tank, goldfish, water plants, glass reflections, antique-style camera, and dried flowers. Green bokeh outside the window. Main light enters from the window in the background, rimming the hair, cheeks, shoulders, and knees. Inside, soft reflected light lifts shadows, casting fine dappled sunlight shadows on blankets and wood grain.

Composition/Camera:
Natural camera position looking down diagonally from a slightly high viewpoint. 35mm to 50mm lens feel. Focus on the face and upper body, with the records in the foreground and greenery in the back lightly blurred. Depth created by diagonal leg lines, vertical window frames, and left/right frames of the bookshelf and fish tank. Shallow depth of field like a pro camera.

Texture/Style:
Realistic photographic expression. Carefully depicts warm film tones, soft highlights, natural skin texture, thin hair strands, texture of wood and cloth, and transparency of the glass fish tank. A calm finish like a magazine photo, rather than excessive skin smoothing.

Negative:
Unnatural face, unnatural gaze, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, deformed toes, poor contact with tools, floating, unnatural gravity, wrong perspective, shadows inconsistent with light source, garbled text, readable brand logos, watermarks, existing characters, excessive exposure, excessive skin smoothing, plastic-like skin.

promptZh:
主体：洒满斑驳阳光的房间。

主要主体：4:3 横构图室内肖像。一位 20 多岁的女性 坐在画面右侧，呈现从上半身到脚部的近全身构图。人物占据了整个画面的约一半，双腿向左前方延伸，形成一条对角线。左侧是 书架和唱片架，右侧是鱼缸和木桌，营造出一个类似窗边日式小型工作室的空间。

人物/表情：明亮的象牙米色调白皙皮肤，质感细腻，透着淡淡的粉色红晕。柔和的高光落在脸颊、鼻尖、肩膀、锁骨和膝盖上，保留了自然的皮肤纹理。精致优雅的日系玩偶妆容。淡玫瑰粉色腮红，香槟米色和粉棕色眼影，细长的睫毛，自然的卧蚕，浅棕色柔和眉毛，以及半透明的粉米色唇彩。眼睛里有清晰的小光点。微微朝左上方看，表情宁静，仿佛在仰望窗外的光线。

服装/姿势：头发是明亮的奶茶灰棕色。薄薄的空气刘海，脸颊两侧有层次感的剪裁，中长发垂至肩下。发尾微微内扣，细致地刻画了挑染和自然的碎发。服装为 米白色象牙色罗纹吊带衫。细肩带，胸前有精致的蕾丝，剪裁自然贴合身体，展现成熟的轮廓。下身搭配同色系的柔软短裤。赤脚，不穿堆堆袜。右手撑在身后的靠垫上，左臂自然地放在腰侧。膝盖微屈，双脚轻轻触碰左前方的唱片架。

背景/光影：午后的阳光并不强烈，透过旧木窗框照进温暖的日式复古房间。左侧是木质书架、平装书、唱片、旧乐器和一个圆形的镜面球。后方是木箱、植物和一张模糊的蓝色标签。右侧是一个透明鱼缸，里面有金鱼、水生植物、玻璃倒影、复古相机和干花。窗外是绿色的虚化背景。主光源从背景的窗户射入，勾勒出头发、脸颊、肩膀和膝盖的轮廓。室内柔和的反射光提亮了阴影，在毯子和木纹上投下细碎的斑驳阳光。

构图/相机：从略高的视角斜向下俯拍的自然机位。等效 35mm 至 50mm 镜头感。焦点对准面部和上半身，前景的唱片和背景的绿植轻微虚化。通过腿部的对角线、窗框的垂直线以及书架和鱼缸的左右构图营造出空间深度。浅景深效果，如同专业相机拍摄。

质感/风格：写实的摄影表现。细致地描绘了温暖的胶片色调、柔和的高光、自然的皮肤纹理、细微的发丝、木材和织物的纹理，以及玻璃鱼缸的透明感。呈现出如同杂志照片般沉稳的质感，而非过度磨皮的修图效果。
